history.content:
<thought>
I am facing upward, and the cell directly in front of me is a lava cell, so moving forward would be fatal. The cell to my right appears to be open floor, so I should turn right to face a safe direction before moving.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I’m facing upward with a wall directly ahead, so I cannot move forward. The left side is also lava-heavy, while the right side is blocked by a wall as well. Turning left keeps me from attempting to walk into the wall and is the safest available reorientation to explore for a route.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I’m at row 07 column D facing upward. The cell directly ahead at row 06 column D is safe floor, so I should move forward rather than turning.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>
